case_title: NAKANO, GLORIA vs. NASSERY, IRAN et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-25-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT.
